name: distinct reporting ids emitted by the same tool are grouped as distinct rules, not merged
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"checkov"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"CKV_K8S_16","level":"error","message":{"text":"x"}},{"ruleId":"CKV_K8S_20","level":"warning","message":{"text":"y"}}]}]}' > a.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . 2>e.txt; grep -q 'group-by-rule rules=2 findings=2' e.txt && echo distinct-ids-distinct-rules 1>&2
